name: Slack
description: Send messages, search channels, summarize threads
longDescription: Connect Slack so the AI can post updates, search across channels and DMs, summarize busy threads, and pull the context you need into the side panel while you keep working.
author: BrowseCortex

apiKeyConfig.label: Slack Bot Token
apiKeyConfig.helperText: Create a Slack app and copy its bot token

examplePrompts: Summarize what I missed in #engineering today
Find the thread where we discussed pricing
What did Sarah say about the launch?
DM myself a reminder about the standup
